name: Sour Cream Softies
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together the flour, salt, baking powder, and baking soda.
2. In a separate bowl, cream the butter and sugar until light and fluffy.
3. Add the eggs and vanilla extract to the butter mixture and mix well.
4. Gradually add the sour cream to the butter mixture, alternating with small spoonfuls of the flour mixture.
5. Drop spoonfuls of batter onto greased baking sheets, spreading each into a round shape.
6. Sprinkle the top of each round with cinnamon and sugar.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 400 degrees Fahrenheit for about 12 minutes, or until the edges are lightly golden brown.
8. Remove from the baking sheets and allow to cool before serving.
